name: Loanstar Title Loans
description_short: Loanstar Title Loans Pasadena, Texas — LoanStar Title Loans offers fast cash loans up to $10,000 secured by vehicle titles, with multiple Fort Worth-are...
description_long:
LoanStar Title Loans was founded in 1990 in Jonesboro, Georgia, and has operated for over 25 years as a vehicle equity lending company. The company positions itself as helping "hardworking Americans use the equity in their vehicle to access the cash they need." The Fort Worth location at 8304 Camp Bowie is one of several branches serving the Dallas-Fort Worth metropolitan area, with additional locations in Haltom City, Richland Hills, and Burleson.

The company offers auto title loans—cash advances secured by clear vehicle titles—with loan amounts up to $10,000. Borrowers need only a vehicle, valid photo ID, and a clear title to qualify. LoanStar accepts multiple payment methods for repayment, including cash, check, debit card, and Western Union transfers. The Fort Worth location operates Monday through Friday, 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM, and Saturday 9:00 AM to 2:00 PM, with a toll-free application line at 877-511-CASH.

LoanStar distinguishes itself through its multi-location network across the DFW area, which provides convenience for repeat customers and local accessibility. The company publishes fee schedules for multiple loan amounts ($600, $1,200, $2,000) in both single and multiple installment formats, indicating transparency around pricing structures. The 35+ year operational history suggests established underwriting and servicing infrastructure.

Title loans are a high-cost emergency financing option, typically carrying APRs significantly higher than traditional lending products. While LoanStar provides accessible credit to borrowers who may lack alternatives, the collateral-based nature means vehicle loss is a genuine risk if payments are missed. The absence of interest rate information on the public-facing website limits upfront pricing transparency for shoppers.
pros: Loan amounts up to $10,000—significantly higher than payday loans
Multiple DFW locations (5 listed nearby) provide physical accessibility and local service
Fast funding available for emergency cash needs
Clear documentation with published fee schedules for different loan sizes
Multiple repayment methods accepted (cash, check, debit card, Western Union)
Minimal qualification requirements (vehicle, ID, clear title only)
Established company operating since 1990 with 25+ year track record
cons: Title loans carry vehicle repossession risk if payments are missed
APR and specific interest rates not disclosed on website, preventing rate comparison
Limited hours (weekday close at 6 PM, weekend close at 2-3 PM) may not accommodate all schedules
Loan amounts still modest compared to personal loans for larger financial needs
No online application or funding process mentioned—requires in-person visit or phone
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate cash emergencies with limited credit access
Borrowers who own vehicles outright and need short-term liquidity
Fort Worth area residents who prefer in-person lending transactions
Those unable to qualify for traditional personal loans or credit cards
diagnosis: LoanStar Title Loans is best for vehicle owners in the DFW area experiencing genuine cash emergencies who have exhausted other borrowing options. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-cost debt secured by vehicle collateral—borrowers must be confident in their ability to repay within the loan term to avoid losing their vehicle.
services: In-person loan processing at multiple DFW locations
Multiple payment method acceptance (cash, check, debit card, Western Union)
Multi-location service network across Dallas-Fort Worth
OCCC notice compliance and licensing information
